title: Silver Support Scheme
text:
Silver Support Scheme - SupportGoWhere
Silver Support Scheme
Share link
Provides a quarterly cash supplement to give eligible seniors greater assurance in retirement.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible seniors can receive quarterly cash payments of up to $1,080
Seniors living in smaller HDB flats or with lower monthly per capita household income will get higher payments
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

Quarterly cash payments of $215 to $1,080, depending on HDB flat type and monthly per capita household incomes per person

Who is this for?

Eligibility criteria

Singapore Citizen

65 years old and above

Total CPF contributions made by age 55 is not more than $140,000

Lives in a 1-room to 5-room HDB flat

Recipient and spouse do not own a 5-room or larger HDB flat, private property or multiple properties

Monthly household income per person of up to $2,300

How to apply?

No application required

Eligible seniors will be notified by the CPF Board

Where can I find help?

View more details

Silver Support Hotline: 1800 227 1188

To avoid waiting on the line, you may book an appointment here.

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Note: By appointment only

Scheme last updated 27 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
